nasb.text: The Lord has bared His holy arm In the sight of all the nations, That all the ends of the earth may see The salvation of our God.

esv.text: The Lord has bared his holy arm before the eyes of all the nations, and all the ends of the earth shall see the salvation of our God.

cnv.text: 耶和華在萬國的眼前， 顯露他的聖臂， 地極的人必看見 我們　神的拯救。

ccb.text: 耶和华要向万国展现祂神圣的大能， 普天下将看见我们上帝的救恩。

csbs.text: 耶和华在万国的眼前，显露他圣洁的膀臂； 所有地极都看见我们神的救恩。
